title: Claude 4.8 Is A Beast… But There’s A Big Problem
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 has launched with improvements in coding and agentic tasks at the same price, but the video argues there is a contradiction: Anthropic claims the model is more honest while technical notes suggest it is getting better at scoring well on evaluations. The video positions this as a reliability concern despite benchmark improvements.
